top_signals.title: China’s Return to the Energy Market Could Become the Next Global Price Shock
top_signals.summary: For months, China’s reduced appetite for oil and LNG imports has helped ease some of the pressure on already-strained global energy markets. But Beijing’s current strategy appears less about weakening demand and more about caution amid the Iran war and the growing risks surrounding Middle Eastern supply routes. Chinese buyers have been drawing down inventories, slowing refinery activity, and delaying spot purchases while waiting for safer and potentially cheaper cargo opportunities. The problem for global markets is that this balancing…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India says 10 sailors detained in 2025 by Iran released
top_signals.summary: Ten Indian sailors, detained in Iran in July 2025 on an oil tanker, have been released after “sustained diplomatic engagement”, India’s shipping authorities said late on May 26. The sailors on the MV Harbour Phoenix were “detained, arrested and imprisoned in Iran following the vessel’s interception near Jask Port in July 2025”, the Directorate-General of ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Indian Register of Shipping Awards Type Approval Certification to GRSE for Marine Hull and Line Valves
top_signals.summary: Indian Register of Shipping (IRS) is pleased to announce the handover of Type Approval Certificate to Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Limited (GRSE), Kolkata, for its range of Hull and Line Valves intended for use onboard defence and commercial ships and vessels. The approved valves, manufactured in Nickel Aluminium Bronze (NAB) and Stainless Steel (SS), ...

top_signals.title: APC seals MarineLINE tanker recoating contract with Sterling Ocean Shipping
top_signals.summary: AVON, OHIO headquartered manufacturer Advanced Polymer Coatings (APC) has begun work on a recoating programme for Sterling Ocean Shipping aimed at delivering major operational advantages for the international company. Six Sterling Ocean 25,000 DWT tankers are being recoated with APC’s high-performance MarineLINE coating system – with the US-headquartered operator set to benefit from increased efficiency, ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: HOT PORT NEWS from GAC
top_signals.summary: Oil jetty out of service 27 May 2026, Lome, Togo • Oil Jetty unavailable until June 7, 2026. • Vessels directed to ore wharf. • No priority for vessels refusing double-banking. READS MORE Source: GAc

MMG App updated with Hantavirus guidance
top_signals.summary: The MMG is an easy-to-use medical App designed specifically for seafarers, providing up-to-date guidance on both physical and mental health conditions at sea. Developed by Gard and the Norwegian Centre for Maritime and Diving Medicine, it ensures that shipboard medical officers and crew have reliable access to current, evidence-based recommendations when treating illness or injury ...
